heading: Definitions
label: 8509 Definitions
text: The term “facility” or “Department facility” as used in this subchapter means those facilities over which the Department has direct and exclusive administrative jurisdiction, including hospitals or other facilities on property owned or leased by the United States while operated by the Department.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5209 of this titlesubstituted “Department” for “Veterans’ Administration” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 102–83
